risk_if_not_implemented: Without Performance Monitoring, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Continuous Monitoring
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of enterprise-wide monitoring controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Continuous Monitoring (MON-01) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Performance Monitoring (CAP-04) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Monitoring Reporting
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to provide an event log report generation capability to aid in detecting and assessing anomalous activities.
compensating_control_2.justification: Monitoring Reporting (MON-06) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Performance Monitoring (CAP-04) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
